seo.home_title: DonherBy | Global Boutique Logistics & Supply Chain Solutions
seo.home_desc: DonherBy provides strategic multimodal solutions for project logistics, aviation assets, and cold chain globally.
seo.home_keywords: boutique logistics, project logistics, cold chain, global supply chain, aviation asset transport
seo.about_title: About DonherBy | Transforming Global Supply Chains
seo.about_desc: Learn about DonherBy's commitment to agility, zero-impact logistics, and transparent communication across the globe.
seo.services_title: Services | Deep Ocean, Global Air & Multimodal Transit
seo.services_desc: Explore our premium Deep Ocean, Global Air, and Multimodal & Rail logistics services tailored for complex cargo.
seo.expertise_title: Expertise | Aviation, Cold Chain & Project Logistics Solutions
seo.expertise_desc: Specialized stewardship for high-value aviation assets, perishables, and out-of-gauge (OOG) industrial cargo.
seo.contact_title: Contact Us | Connect with DonherBy Logistics
seo.contact_desc: Reach out to DonherBy for custom logistics planning, rapid emergency deployment, and 24/7 global support.

footer.desc: DonherBy is a premier boutique logistics firm providing strategic multimodal solutions for global supply chains.

contact.hero_desc: Connect with our leadership team for a discrete, high-level feasibility assessment of your complex logistics requirements.
contact.subtitle: Strategic Contact
contact.title: Consult with our Strategists
contact.desc: Direct access to senior leadership ensures your complex logistics challenges are met with aviation-grade precision.

network.title: Our Strategic Global Network
network.desc: Operating seamlessly alongside the world's premier ocean carriers and logistics providers to ensure priority routing.

home.hero_desc: Leveraging 15+ years of strategic expertise to deliver seamless, end-to-end logistics from China to the world. We don’t just move cargo; we optimize your business flow.
home.edge_1_desc: We intentionally maintain an elite, focused team to ensure you receive high-touch service that global giants cannot replicate.
home.edge_2_desc: Our core team has worked together for a decade, mastering the nuances of multimodal transport.
home.edge_3_desc: Direct access to decision-makers means faster solutions and zero bureaucratic delays.
home.edge_4_desc: Expertly navigating the complexities of Sea, Air, Rail, and Land with an extensive global network.
home.solutions_desc: We don’t just move cargo; we architect seamless transitions from origin to destination.

ocean.title: Ocean Excellence
ocean.desc: High-capacity, cost-optimized shipping via our premier carrier network.

air.title: Precision Air
air.desc: Time-critical solutions for your most urgent inventory needs.

rail.title: The Silk Road Rail
rail.desc: Specialized daily departures linking China’s hubs to Europe in 15–20 days.

hybrid.title: Sea-Air Hybrid
hybrid.desc: Our signature solution—saving 50% in costs vs. air with significantly faster transit than sea.

warehouse.title: Intelligent Warehousing
warehouse.desc: Strategic Buffer Management and Breakbulk Terminals ensuring agile, close-to-market inventory.

customs.title: Seamless Compliance
customs.desc: Expert-led Customs Brokerage and end-to-end DDP/DDU/EXW management.

market.desc: We concentrate our resources where global trade is most vital, ensuring deep carrier relationships and priority handling in every hub.
market.eu_desc: As our primary market, we offer unparalleled access to the European hinterland. Through our 6-hub Rail network and Sea-Air hybrid routes, we bridge China and Europe with industry-leading reliability.
market.jp_desc: Precision-timed logistics for high-tech and automotive sectors. Specialized handling for 'just-in-time' supply chains between China and East Asia’s industrial hearts.
market.sea_desc: Navigating the rapid expansion of the ASEAN trade bloc. Localized knowledge ensures smooth customs and multi-modal transit.

expertise.desc: We excel where others hesitate. High-stakes cargo, complex compliance, and zero-margin-for-error logistics.
expertise.cat_1_desc: Heavy machinery and out-of-gauge project cargo routing.
expertise.cat_3_desc: Precision cold chain for food and pharma.

about.hero_desc: "Born from a decade of synergy within the world's logistics giants, DonherBy was founded to return 'Expertise' to its rightful place: at the center of the client relationship."
about.phil_bold: Why a small team is your biggest advantage.
about.phil_desc: In an industry of faceless algorithms, we offer Human Intelligence. Our 'Elite 10' core team has shared over a decade of operational history. This synergy allows us to bypass global disruptions in real-time, making decisions that corporate giants are too slow to execute.
about.leader_desc_1: Louis is a supply chain strategist who engineers resilience for high-growth enterprises. Having optimized complex distribution networks for global leaders like IKEA and Panasonic, he founded DonherBy to provide the senior-level oversight that global giants lack.
about.leader_desc_2: He ensures that every milestone—from the first mile in China to the last mile in Europe—is handled with zero-failure rigor.
about.market_desc: "We don't try to be everywhere; we choose to be the best where it matters most."
about.market_eu_desc: Our primary zone of dominance, covering and synchronizing Northern, Southern, and Western European hubs.
about.market_jp_desc: Navigating high-standard East Asian industrial corridors with meticulous precision.
about.market_sea_desc: Facilitating rapid deployment and scaling in the world's fastest-emerging manufacturing markets.
about.infra_desc: Even as a boutique firm, our scale is massive. We deploy institutional-grade infrastructure combined with boutique agility.
about.infra_card1_body1_desc: 14 primary warehousing facilities located in China's most vital logistics corridors, including Shanghai, Guangzhou, Wuhan, and Xi'an.
about.infra_card1_body2_desc: Capabilities ranging from standard CFS operations to high-precision temperature-controlled environments (-25°C to 25°C).
about.infra_card1_body3_desc: Automated WMS (Warehouse Management System) integration for real-time SKU-level visibility and FIFO/LIFO accuracy.
about.infra_card2_body1_desc: Deep regional mastery with 77% of operations focused on the European market, complemented by strong roots in Japan, Korea, and SE Asia.
about.infra_card2_body2_desc: A vetted network of partners with 10+ years of collaborative history, ensuring the "DonherBy Standard" is maintained at every destination.
about.infra_card2_body3_desc: Expert-led customs clearance and "last-mile" delivery in key industrial zones from Hamburg to Ho Chi Minh City.

services_page.hero_desc: We provide a full range of transport modes to ensure global connectivity with a "personal touch". From multimodal forwarding to dynamic order management.
services_page.multimodal_desc: Comprehensive solutions covering Sea, Air, Rail, and Road. Main Routes: Strong focus on high-value markets with 77% of business in Europe, 15% in Japan/Korea, and 8% in Southeast Asia.
services_page.ocean_desc: Strategic partnerships with major global carriers (e.g., Maersk, MSC, COSCO) for priority space.
services_page.air_desc: Personalized air services tailored to specific business needs, including one-stop handling for goods.
services_page.rail_desc: Specialized block train connections (Trans-Eurasian) and trucking connecting China and Europe.
services_page.hybrid_desc: Reduces costs and carbon emissions by 50% compared to pure air, while being 50% faster than sea.
services_page.wh_desc: Extensive storage facilities and technical logistics services designed to buffer and accelerate your global inventory.
services_page.wh_stat_desc: Covering 280,000 m² across strategic hubs in China.
services_page.wh_item1_desc: Includes both covered general warehousing and highly-regulated bonded warehouse space.
services_page.wh_item2_desc: SKU-level tracking (FIFO/LIFO) via a dedicated WMS giving you real-time secure customer login access.
services_page.wh_item3_desc: Labelling, palletizing, sorting, repacking, kitting, and strict quality control within A/C facilities.
services_page.proj_desc: Handling high-complexity and industrial-grade cargo requiring expert oversight from blueprint to delivery.
services_page.proj_item1_desc: Dedicated management for complex international supply chains and oversized cargo.
services_page.proj_item2_desc: Operation of multi-purpose terminals equipped with all-weather and heavy-lift facilities.
services_page.proj_item3_desc: Active and passive temp-controlled solutions (-25°C to 25°C) using 45’ reefer / insulated containers.
services_page.proj_item4_desc: One-stop shop for handling critical documentation and ensuring strict global regulatory compliance.
services_page.tech_desc: Securing end-to-end visibility. We utilize advanced integration to track, audit, and optimize your entire supply chain flow.
services_page.tech_item1_desc: Flawless execution of orders and precise supplier coordination directly from the point of issue.
services_page.tech_item2_desc: Live reporting on milestones, equipment planning, and landed costs with real-time data quality management.

expertise_page.hero_desc: We specialize in the logistics other providers find too difficult. From aviation assets to temperature-sensitive global supply chains, our expertise is measured by the integrity of your cargo.
expertise_page.sect1_desc: Specialized stewardship for complex cargo where integrity is the only metric that matters.
expertise_page.sect1_case_desc: Engineered the end-to-end planning, vibration-sensitive handling, and rapid global deployment required for high-value commercial jet engines, ensuring flight-ready operational integrity upon landing.
expertise_page.sect1_item1: Zero Impact Events recorded during transit
expertise_page.sect2_desc: End-to-end cold chain management specializing in Pharma, Food, and Chemicals where uninterrupted integrity is paramount.
expertise_page.sect2_sol_act_desc: Deployment of 45' Reefer containers heavily integrated with diesel gensets for constant, unyielding power.
expertise_page.sect2_sol_pas_desc: High-performance insulated containers deployed specifically for shorter-duration thermal stability.
expertise_page.sect3_desc: Strategic handling for non-standard cargo in the Energy, Steel, and Infrastructure sectors.
expertise_page.sect3_item1_desc: Professional terminal management and specialized loading for oversized industrial commodities.
expertise_page.sect3_item2_desc: Strategic project planning and physical road surveys executed to bypass infrastructural constraints safely.
expertise_page.sect4_desc: Optimizing the land bridge between China and Europe via the Rail Block Train network.
expertise_page.sect4_item1_desc: Engineered to be precisely 50% faster than sea transport while being 50% more cost-effective than traditional air routing.
expertise_page.sect4_item2_desc: Deep ground-level operational expertise stationed in Xi'an, Wuhan, and Chongqing ensuring prioritized cargo clearance.
expertise_page.sect4_item3_desc: Drives a massive reduction in the gross supply chain CO2 footprint compared to air freight, boosting ESC compliance profiles.
expertise_page.verticals_desc: Applying agile logic and deep technical standards across multi-sector challenges.
expertise_page.vert1_desc: Exacting expertise in securing and transporting Class 2-9 Dangerous Goods across borders.
expertise_page.vert2_desc: Executing immaculate Just-In-Time (JIT) parts distribution for manufacturing lines.
expertise_page.vert3_desc: High-security, anti-theft, and tightly climate-controlled transit for delicate electronics.
expertise_page.vert4_desc: Supporting high-velocity SKU distribution, repacking, and e-commerce agility.
expertise_page.vert5_desc: Specialized structural handling for oversized, high-value, and sensitive retail distribution.
expertise_page.vert6_desc: Flawlessly executing GDP-compliant medical and pharmaceutical supply chain integrity.
expertise_page.cta_text_1: Your challenge requires more than a quote;
